2603.26260.title: GeoGuide: Hierarchical Geometric Guidance for Open-Vocabulary 3D Semantic Segmentation
2603.26260.paper_summary: Open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation aims to segment arbitrary categories beyond the training set. Existing methods predominantly rely on distilling knowledge from 2D open-vocabulary models. However, aligning 3D features to the 2D representation space restricts intrinsic 3D geometric learning and inherits errors from 2D predictions. To address these limitations, we propose GeoGuide, a novel framework that leverages pretrained 3D models to integrate hierarchical geometry-semantic consistency for open-vocabulary 3D segmentation. Specifically, we introduce an Uncertainty-based Superpoint Distillation module to fuse geometric and semantic features for estimating per-point uncertainty, adaptively weighting 2D features within superpoints to suppress noise while preserving discriminative information to enhance local semantic consistency. Furthermore, our Instance-level Mask Reconstruction module leverages geometric priors to enforce semantic consistency within instances by reconstructing complete instance masks. Additionally, our Inter-Instance Relation Consistency module aligns geometric and semantic similarity matrices to calibrate cross-instance consistency for same-category objects, mitigating viewpoint-induced semantic drift. Extensive experiments on ScanNet v2, Matterport3D, and nuScenes demonstrate the superior performance of GeoGuide.
2603.26260.paper_summary_zh: 開放詞彙的 3D 語義分割旨在對訓練集之外的任意類別進行分割。現有的方法主要依賴於從 2D 開放詞彙模型中提取知識。然而，將 3D 特徵對齊到 2D 表示空間限制了內在的 3D 幾何學習，並繼承了來自 2D 預測的錯誤。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了 GeoGuide，一個新穎的框架，利用預訓練的 3D 模型來整合層次幾何-語義一致性，以實現開放詞彙的 3D 分割。具體而言，我們引入了一個基於不確定性的超點蒸餾模塊，融合幾何和語義特徵以估計每點的不確定性，根據超點內的 2D 特徵自適應加權，以抑制噪聲，同時保留區分性信息，以增強局部語義一致性。此外，我們的實例級掩膜重建模塊利用幾何先驗通過重建完整的實例掩膜來強化實例內的語義一致性。此外，我們的實例間關係一致性模塊對齊幾何和語義相似性矩陣，以校準同類物體的跨實例一致性，減輕視角引起的語義漂移。在 ScanNet v2、Matterport3D 和 nuScenes 上進行的廣泛實驗顯示了 GeoGuide 的優越性能。
2603.26260.author: Xujing Tao et.al.
2603.26260.authors: Xujing Tao, Chuxin Wang, Yubo Ai, Zhixin Cheng, Zhuoyuan Li, Liangsheng Liu, Yujia Chen, Xinjun Li, Qiao Li, Wenfei Yang, Tianzhu Zhang
